examples.metadata_note: Oster bounds numerically undefined for Spec C
examples.metadata_interpretation: Near-zero delta_R2 implies triple interaction explains essentially no additional variance beyond two-way terms, making Oster comparison uninformative

examples.metadata_mde_units: 1 SD change in LDem per SD change in E_ter_std × (G_std × S_std)
examples.metadata_interpretation: MDE=39.84693 vs |beta_EGS|=4.218107; ratio=0.11. Underpowered: estimated effect smaller than MDE at 80%/5%.

examples.metadata_units: LDem SD change per 1-SD change in E_ter_std
LDem SD change per 1-SD change in E_ter_std
LDem SD change per 1-SD change in E_ter_std
LDem SD change per 1-SD change in E_ter_std

examples.metadata_original_dataset: 2-period UNDP HDR25 MYS panel, post-1990 developing democratizers
examples.metadata_original_education_proxy: UNDP HDR25 Mean Years of Schooling (MYS)
examples.metadata_original_within_SD_units: years of schooling, within-country SD across 2 periods
examples.metadata_original_critical_flaw: within-SD=0.026 is imputation noise (MYS frozen at 2017 in UNDP HDR25, linearly interpolated 2015-2022)
examples.metadata_current_education_proxy: World Bank SE.TER.ENRR (gross tertiary enrollment rate, %)
examples.metadata_current_standardization: E_std = (educ_tertiary - mean_ter) / sd_ter within N analysis sample
